title: Recipe Ratings
description: A companion mod for Rat's Enrichment adding hyperspecific indicators informing players a little more about the the modpacks recipes
body:
A custom mod made for Rat’s Enrichment; Recipe Ratings are small indicators on a recipe inside of EMI which tell a player more about the recipes at their disposal.

Importantly the ratings inform a player on the balance and fairness of a recipe in a modpack where it's the players responsiblity to balance their playthrough to their own tastes.

# Rat's Enrichments Ratings
Unchanged mods are indicated with the rating **Vanilla Default**, and while most base-game recipes are untouched there are some that have had their defaults tweaked for better integration called **Rat's Default**.

The indicator system is also to show players what kind of player they're intended for:
Players who want to decorate and build cand cut down on grinding and resource gathering with a **Builders Shortcut**.

Newer players can use **Sequence Break**s to access parts of a mod they would otherwise struggle to reach, and experienced players might use them to skip a process they've played through dozens of time already.

For an added challenge, **Artisans Process** rakings are given to recipes that are more complicated or expensive then the default. These recipes can sometimes be part of a larger **Glorp Quest** ranking.
Named after Hrry, **Glorp Quests** are the most convoluted recipes in the pack and are intended as a bigger, long term goal for automated minded players to sink their teeth into
